name: Crystalvue Medical Corporation
summary: Crystalvue Medical Corporation designs, manufactures, and sells medical devices. Its products include OCT devices, fundus cameras, chin rest devices, digital microscope cameras, tonometers, nucleic acid extraction system, polymerase chain reaction system, gastrointestinal endoscopic disposable devices, etc. The company offers automated retina cameras; FundusVue, a diagnosis instrument for ophthalmologists to inspect and record the patients' retina; and TonoVue, a diagnosis instrument to measure IOP of the patient. Crystalvue Medical Corporation was founded in 2009 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
